title: GARDENA Basic Gardening Tools Bundle - Wide Classic Hand Trowel, Flower Fork and Classic Secateurs
detail_text: Specifications BrandGARDENASKU729206629_SGAMZ-2318526587Pruner TypePruners Highlights Basic set consists of GARDENA Classic Hand Trowel x1, GARDENA Classic Flower Fork x1, GARDENA Classic Secateurs x1 The GARDENA Classic Hand Trowel is the optimal tool for planting and transplanting in flower boxes, flowerpots and flowerbeds. The ergonomically shaped handle fits perfectly in the hand and is angled at the end to prevent slipping. The Hand Trowel has a width of 8 cm. It is produced from high-quality steel. The Duroplast coating ensures a long product lifetime. The GARDENA Classic Flower Fork is the optimal tool for root-friendly planting and transplanting in flower boxes, flowerpots and flowerbeds. The ergonomically shaped handle fits perfectly in the hand and is angled at the end to prevent slipping. The Flower Fork has a width of 7.5 cm. It is produced from high-quality steel. The Duroplast coating ensures a long product lifetime. The GARDENA Classic Secateurs are the classic among the secateurs – with everything that marks good secateurs. They cut powerfully and are modern and ergonomic; they are best-suited for cutting flowers and young shoots. The blades of the angled cutting head are non-stick coated and precision-ground. Thanks to the ergonomically formed handles, the secateurs lie optimally in the hand. The two holding positions allow both power cutting and quick snipping. The secateurs have a sap groove and a wire cutter. With the single-hand safety lock, the secateurs can be easily locked and safely stored. The Classic Secateurs cut a maximum branch diameter of 18 mm. Description If you want to report an issue with this item Click Here

title: Gardena G8733 Comfort Grass Shears
detail_text: The Grass Shears Comfort from GARDENA are the right cutting tool for lawn care, ready to quickly and easily cut precise lawn edges. The shears have an ergonomic handle with soft grip, so that it is very easy to hold and rests comfortably in the hand. It has a practical single-hand lock, which means you can easily close them with just one hand after use. The non-stick wave-ground blades make sure that as little as possible of the grass clippings get caught on the tool. In combination with the built-in runner, you can easily guide the grass shears at a constant cutting height and make precise cuts along the lawn edge. The Grass Shears Comfort are a genuine quality product made in Germany. Express your vision with precision. Easy to use, effective and durable cutting tools for creative gardeners.. - Easy cutting: Thanks to the ergonomic shape of the handle, the Grass Shears lie comfortably in the hand and cutting is especially easy. - Precise cutting: Thanks to the non-stick coated, wave-ground cutting blade, easy and precise cutting is possible. - Powerful cutting: The special blade bearing allows even, powerful cutting over the whole blade length. - Easy guidance: The runner skids of the Grass Shears allow easy guidance and a consistent cutting height.

detail_html:
Gardena Classic Multifunctional Sprayer

Offering four different spray patterns, a practical on/off trigger and protection against UV and occiasional frost, the high-quality multifunctional sprayer makes watering easy.

✔Four spray patterns: The Multifunctional Sprayer can be used for various watering and cleaning tasks.

✔Reliable quality: The multifunctional sprayer is built to GARDENA's high standard and made in Germany.

✔Weather-resistant: The sprayer is protected against UV and occasional frost during the gardening season.

✔No tiring of the hand: The on/off trigger locks automatically, allowing the sprayer to maintain a steady flow.

✔Included: 1x Classic Multifunctional Sprayer

✔The Classic Multifunctional Sprayer from GARDENA features four versatile spray patterns, is protected against UV and occasional frost during the gardening season and German-made quality.

👍Four versatile spray patterns

The Classic Multifunctional Sprayer offers a choice of four spray patterns. The cone jet is made for watering delicate plants, while the hard jet is designed for cleaning. The volume jet is suitable for watering potted plants, and the soft spray pattern is suited to thorough watering jobs of flower and vegetable beds. You can effortlessly switch between spray patterns, helping you to complete watering or cleaning tasks quickly and effectively.

👍Reliable quality

This sprayer delivers GARDENA watering competence: It is made in Germany and uses high-quality materials.

👍Weather-resistant

The Multifunctional Sprayer is protected against UV and occasional frost. The sprayer can be left outdoors during the gardening season.

👍No tiring of the hand during longer watering

Watering and cleaning over long periods can easily tire out hands, which is why this sprayer has been designed with an automatically lockable on/off trigger. Simply push the trigger and it locks - for watering and cleaning without tired hands.

👍Adjustable amount of water for various tasks

Seamless volume regulation allows the water flow to be quickly and easily altered to suit various tasks. Water volume can be adjusted between 100% and 20%, making the spray pattern softer.

title: Gardena G814 Comfort Pressure Sprayer 1.25L
detail_text: The GARDENA Comfort Pressure Sprayer 1.25 l has a filling capacity of 1.25 litres and is the ideal product for universal use in the garden and home. Contrary to the Pump Sprayers, pressure must simply be built up in the sprayer and then, with the press of a button, plants can be effortlessly watered. The Comfort Pressure Sprayer is especially convenient: the ergonomic pump- and handle grip, as well as the integrated absorption in the handle, allow optimal shock absorption during pumping. It is designed for up to max. 3 bar and is equipped with a safety valve that reduces pressure when required. The level indicator shows the filling quantity without the need to open the container. The nozzle is fully adjustable from hard jet to fine mist and can be individually applied. The filter at the suction pipe is practical and protects against nozzle obstruction.

The wave-ground blades with non-stick coating ensure that as few clippings as possible stick to the tool and that precise cuts are made. In addition, the special blade bearing delivers consistently powerful cutting along the entire length of the blade.
